hero.title: IT Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Technical Support
hero.subtitle: Crafting robust and scalable web applications and software with a focus on clean architecture and optimal user experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Computer science engineer with experience in software development and enterprise technical support. I've supported international companies like Meta, Cloudera, Lionpoint, and Skechers, developing strong skills in troubleshooting and professional communication.
about.p2: My technical stack includes JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Django, and .NET, with experience in Git, Linux environments, and modern development workflows.
about.p3: I'm driven by code quality, scalability, and continuous improvement, always looking to deliver reliable and efficient solutions that generate real impact.

list.title: YGO Ai Link
list.description: Web application that combines a Yu-Gi-Oh! card database with an AI-powered chat assistant. Users can browse and search a comprehensive card database, chat with an AI assistant (Ai/Dark Ignis) to learn about cards, archetypes, mechanics, and strategies, and get explanations on concepts like handtraps, omni negates, endboards, deck archetypes, and more.
features: Card Database - Searchable catalog with filtering by type, attribute, level, etc.
AI Chat Assistant - Contextual AI responses powered by Groq LLM
Dynamic Knowledge - Fetches archetype/playstyle info from Yugipedia with caching
Chat Persistence - Chat history saved to localStorage
Responsive UI - Expandable/collapsible chat window with suggested questions

list.title: ArtesanoMarket
list.description: E-commerce web application for handcrafted products. Features product catalog, shopping cart, electronic invoice generation, user authentication, and profile customization. Users can publish their own products. Includes protected admin panel for managing users, orders, and products.
features: Product catalog with search and filtering

list.title: Maze Solver
list.description: Interactive maze solver application that uses BFS and DFS algorithms to find exits in ASCII labyrinths. Users can generate random mazes and watch the algorithms solve them step by step. An academic project demonstrating pathfinding algorithms.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.subtitle: A showcase of my work in full-stack development and web applications.

jobs.description: Technical support for enterprise clients using Atlassian tools (JIRA, Jira Service Desk, Confluence). Specialized in incident resolution, process automation, and professional client communication.
Full-stack development using .NET Framework, Java, C#, and SQL. Built enterprise applications with VBA integration and version control using Git.
Comprehensive training in web development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js), cloud technologies (AWS), data analysis, and agile methodologies.

cta.title: Let's Work Together
cta.subtitle: I'm actively seeking challenging roles where I can apply my skills and grow. Let's discuss how I can contribute to your team.
